paper_side_sources_used.source_title_observed: A Small Quarterly Projection Model of the US Economy
paper_side_sources_used.source_authors_observed: Ioan Carabenciov; Igor Ermolaev; Charles Freedman; Michel Juillard; Ondra Kamenik; Dmitry Korshunov; Douglas Laxton
paper_side_sources_used.usage: Model overview, observable definitions, behavioral equations, stochastic processes, financial-real linkage equations, and appendix/table context.

paper_side_sources_used.path: raw/mmb_papers/A small quarterly projection model of the US economy.pdf
paper_side_sources_used.usage: Existence check and targeted pdftotext checks for pages containing equations 1-15, especially output-gap, inflation, policy-rule, Okun, BLT, and BLT distributed-lag equations.

implementation_cross_check.notes: Used only to compare stationary model(linear) form, variable names, shock names, BLT distributed-lag implementation, reporting expectation variables, and parameter names. Not used as paper-side mathematical evidence.

runtime_validation.notes: Current phase is private derivation extraction only. User explicitly requested no Dynare run.

formula_quality.reason: First-pass extraction from MinerU Markdown with targeted PDF text checks. OCR/text extraction ambiguity remains for some bars, epsilons, and trend terms.

catalog_cross_reference.model_type: Estimated small quarterly projection model; linear stationary gap form with financial-real linkages
catalog_cross_reference.key_features: GPM-style small quarterly projection model; output gap; inflation; unemployment gap; Taylor rule; equilibrium real rate; BLT financial-real linkage; Bayesian estimation

copyright_boundary: The derivation summarizes model structure and equations. It does not copy long prose from the paper.
